ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie or TV show */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie or TV show */,
  "release_date" INTEGER /* Year the movie or TV show was released */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Production company responsible for the movie or TV show */,
  "director" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the movie or TV show */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the movie or TV show */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the movie or TV show */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the actor */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the actor */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the actor */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Awards and nominations received by the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor playing the character */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the character appears in */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firearms_props" (
  "fp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firearm or prop */,
  "fp_name" TEXT /* Name of the firearm or prop */,
  "notation" TEXT /* Notation or description of the firearm or prop */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of firearm or prop */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the firearm or prop */,
  "image" TEXT /* Image of the firearm or prop */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_firearms_props" (
  "mfp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-firearm/prop relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "fp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the firearm or prop */,
  "scene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mfp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_firearms_props_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_firearms_props_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_firearms_props_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_firearms_props_scene_id FOREIGN KEY ("scene_id") REFERENCES scenes ("scene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_firearms_props_fp_id FOREIGN KEY ("fp_id") REFERENCES firearms_props ("fp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenes" (
  "scene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scene */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the scene belongs to */,
  "scene_name" TEXT /* Name of the scene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the scene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin, researcher, compliance officer) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "up_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("up_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "fp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the firearm or prop */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the firearm or prop */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the changes made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_fp_id FOREIGN KEY ("fp_id") REFERENCES firearms_props ("fp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the change was made */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was changed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (insert, update, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
